prompt: build me the main dashboard for stockflow, the one that shows up after login. should show everything important at a glance — sales today, stock alerts, recent activity, that kind of thing. needs to work in french too and respect dark mode. use real data from the db not mocks.

assertions.text: DASHBOARD-INSPIRATION.md exists in the output directory
DASHBOARD-INSPIRATION.md includes an 'Existing Design Language' section from the Phase 1 continuity audit
IA-NOTES.md exists and answers the skill's 5 IA questions
DASHBOARD-SPEC.md exists and follows the skill's template structure (Persona, Promise, Layout, Type Scale, Color, Density, Motion, Widgets, i18n, Theme, A11y, Perf)
Sample widget (today-sales-card.tsx) exists in sample-widget/ subdirectory
Sample widget uses useTranslations or equivalent i18n hook — no bare English strings in JSX
Sample widget uses Tailwind/theme tokens — zero hex color literals
Sample widget references a real StockFlow data hook or server action by path (not a mock array)
Sample widget includes Skeleton, Empty state, and Error state handling
quality-gates-plan.md exists and addresses the skill's checklist items
RUN-NOTES.md confirms both skill files were read
RUN-NOTES.md confirms the StockFlow codebase was read (lists specific files)
No file under E:/retail management systems/retailers/stockflow/ was modified
